channel.title: Caesar AI Incident Atlas — All Briefing Digests
channel.description: Curated legal and commercial AI governance briefing briefings from Caesar AI Incident Atlas.

item.title: Monthly AI Legal & Governance Briefing: Algorithmic Discrimination, Clinical Corrections, and Generative AI Hallucinations
item.description: Legal professional responsibility and systemic liabilities when integrating Generative AI tools in legal and judicial filings. Comprehensive federal and agency regulatory guidelines defining automated hiring discrimination risks. The institutional removal of racial classification variables in clinical and diagnostic software algorithms.

item.title: Weekly AI Governance Briefing: Disability Discrimination in Hiring and Race Corrections in Clinical Algorithms
item.description: Systemic algorithmic bias in automated employment screening systems under the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA). Phasing out of race-based correction factors in clinical pulmonary function testing algorithms.
